---
title: "Pragmatics"
author: "Vaishnav Sudarshan"
date: "2026-22-5"
categories:  [Cool Linguistics Stuff, Cool Philosophy Stuff]
tags: [Cool Economics Stuff]
abstract: What do nonverbal cues reveal about meaning in context in a conversation?
---

# Cooperative Principle

# Maxims 

# Maxim of Quality

# Maxim of Quantity

# Maxim of Relevance

# Maxim of Manner

# Violating Maxims

# Flouting Maxims

# Balancing and Optimization
